pageContext.name: Premium BTS Logo: Seoul Edition
pageContext.description: Sideshow presents the Premium BTS Logo: Seoul Edition, a special edition licensed BTS collectible inspired by the beauty and majesty of South Korea.  Measuring 7' tall and 4.5' wide, the Premium BTS Logo: Seoul Edition takes the iconic shape of the 21st-century pop icons' logo, visualized as a set of doors opening outward to possibility, and incorporates vibrant symbols of BTS' home country. These symbols include the mugunghwa (or the rose of Sharon), the silhouette of a Korean red pine, patterns from postal stamps, a Siberian tiger, elements from the South Korean flag, and imagery from the Namsan Mountain.  The Premium BTS Logo: Seoul Edition also features the ARMY symbol on one side of the statue. These symbols exist in harmony, bringing together past and present in one elegant design.  Celebrate the talent and national origin of RM, Jin, SUGA, j-hope, Jimin, V, and Jung Kook when you bring home the Premium BTS Logo: Seoul Edition to your shelf today!
